leadership.source: OGE Energy 2025 Annual Report / ARS proxy filing

signals.signal_title: OG&E signs ESAs for 3 Google data centers in Oklahoma
signals.signal_description: OG&E signed landmark Electric Service Agreements to power 3 Google data centers in Oklahoma (Muskogee x2, Stillwater $3B AI campus). Google pays 100% of grid interconnection costs. New large-load tariff filing pending OCC approval. Major load growth and grid investment catalyst — operational urgency for utility IT modernization.

signals.signal_title: SAP S/4HANA RISE go-live — first legacy utility to migrate 25yr work order history
signals.signal_description: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (RISE) go-live confirmed. OG&E presented at ASUG 2025 as first legacy utility to migrate 25 years of work order history in a single cutover alongside CX 1.0 and EAM modernization. OpenText AI/ML document management and vendor invoice automation deployed simultaneously.

signals.signal_title: $7.3B five-year capital investment plan — 5-7% annual EPS growth target
signals.signal_description: $7.3B five-year capital investment plan disclosed in Q1 2026 investor presentation. Includes generation, transmission, and Frontier Energy Storage 300MW project (pre-approval filed). 5-7% annual EPS growth target confirmed.

signals.signal_title: David Parker promoted to CIO of OG&E
signals.signal_description: David Parker promoted from VP Technology, Data and Security to Chief Information Officer of OG&E in 2025. Led SAP S/4HANA RISE migration — presented at ASUG 2025 as landmark deployment. Deep utility IT background since 2020.
signals.source: OGE Energy 2025 Annual Report / ARS proxy filing

spend_model_flags.channel_mismatch_notes: Channel mismatch cleared — OKC confirmed within WWT STOLA territory coverage. 27% base addressable applies.
spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: CIO David Parker promoted 2025 (+2). SAP S/4HANA RISE landmark migration (+3 partnership signal). OpenText AI/ML document management deployed (+2). Google data center ESAs create operational urgency (+2). No AICOE, no AI at scale. Score 9 — below ≥15 threshold.

enrichment_notes: Regulated electric utility serving ~915,000 customers in Oklahoma and western Arkansas. CIO David Parker promoted 2025 — led landmark SAP S/4HANA RISE migration presented at ASUG 2025 (first legacy utility to migrate 25yr work order history single go-live). OpenText AI/ML document management deployed. LANDMARK April 2026: OG&E signed ESAs to power 3 Google data centers (Muskogee x2, Stillwater $3B AI campus) — major strategic load growth, new large-load tariff filing pending OCC. $7.3B 5-year capex plan. FY2025: $3.26B revenue, $1.36B EBITDA. No MSP confirmed. No OEM direct. ms_standardized=false — no Microsoft 365/Softchoice evidence (SAP + ServiceNow + OpenText stack). Channel mismatch cleared (OKC within STOLA coverage). WWT addressable high $142.6M at 27% (EBITDA×2.5 denominator). If M365 confirmed later, ms_standardized=true would yield ~$164.9M at 32%. WWT opportunity: SAP RISE just completed = integration partner opening, new CIO in seat, Google data center load growth driving grid modernization investment cycle.
